description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linting that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has two jobs: iwyu and format. The iwyu job runs on an ubuntu-latest container with a debian:sid-slim image, installing dependencies, checking out the source with submodules, configuring CMake with Ninja and IWYU, building, and checking the build output. The format job runs on ubuntu-22.04, checks out the source, and runs clang-format on C/C++ files, checking for changes.
